violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Sausage and eggs observed held at 45-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausage and eggs were placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Discussed the prep unit being in the sun impacting temperature control. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

(Chemical) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
Paper towels observed stored unprotected in the toilet room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator, ice bin, counters, shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of dirt and rocks. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The floors including in the walk in freezer and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Bagged ice will be used. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

Sausage was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausage was placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Discussed not overfilling bins in prep unit with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
Bagged ice observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, the syrup shelves, and beverage refrigerator at the front service line have an accumulation of food residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
The dumpster enclosure and surrounding area has an accumulation of trash and vegetation. Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
